sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51521" key="i)xnhlati/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰχνηλ-ᾰτία</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰχνηλ-εία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= ff. ll. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ηλασία</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.11</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
